name: Red Cabbage with Beer
recipeIngredient: 2 Granny Smith apples; peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions: Place all ingredients in a covered pot (I always use one of my Le Creuset pots) and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and cook slowly for about an hour. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed. If there is too much liquid, uncover the pot and continue cooking until most of the liquid has evaporated.
